name: Universal Downloader Bot
description: No-command Telegram bot that auto-detects links and downloads media in original quality.

API_ID.description: Get this from my.telegram.org (your own account, API development tools).

API_HASH.description: Get this from my.telegram.org alongside API_ID.

BOT_TOKEN.description: Create a bot with @BotFather and paste its token here.

OWNER_ID.description: Your own numeric Telegram user ID (send /id to any userinfo bot to get it).

LOG_GROUP.description: Optional: numeric ID of a group/channel to receive download logs.

MAX_FILE_SIZE.description: Max upload size in bytes. Default is 4 GB (4294967296).

MAX_CONCURRENT_DOWNLOADS.description: How many downloads can run at the same time.

AUTO_UPDATE_YTDLP.description: Auto-check PyPI and upgrade yt-dlp on a schedule (true/false).

YTDLP_CHECK_INTERVAL.description: Seconds between yt-dlp auto-update checks. Default 86400 (24h).

COOKIES_FILE.description: Optional: path to your own cookies.txt for content only your account can access. Never obtain cookies or session data from a third party.
